sources.name: 'self'
sources.description: Allows loading resources from the same origin (same scheme, host, and port) as the document.

sources.name: 'unsafe-inline'
sources.description: Allows the use of inline resources, such as inline <script> elements, <style> elements, and inline event handlers.

sources.name: 'strict-dynamic'
sources.description: Allows scripts that are explicitly trusted via a nonce or hash to load and execute additional scripts.

sources.name: 'unsafe-eval'
sources.description: Allows the use of eval() and other similar methods for creating code from strings.

sources.name: 'wasm-unsafe-eval'
sources.description: Allows the use of WebAssembly.instantiate() and other similar methods.

sources.name: 'unsafe-hashes'
sources.description: Allows the use of inline event handlers (like onclick) if their content matches a trusted hash.

sources.name: blob:
sources.description: Allows loading resources from blob: URLs (e.g., created with URL.createObjectURL).

sources.name: data:
sources.description: Allows loading resources from data: URLs (e.g., base64-encoded images).

sources.name: https:
sources.description: Allows loading resources from any HTTPS origin.

sources.name: http:
sources.description: Allows loading resources from any HTTP origin.

sources.name: nonce-
sources.description: Allows a specific inline script or style marked with a cryptographic 'nonce' (number used once).

sources.name: hash-
sources.description: Allows a specific inline script or style whose content matches this cryptographic hash.

sources.name: URL
sources.description: Allows loading resources from this specific domain or host.

sources.name: 'none'
sources.description: Prevents loading any resources of this type.
